name: Synthetic Construction Partner 20 – Former Owner Sold Three Months Ago Negotiating Return
activities: Mehmet Aydin sold his 60% stake in an Ankara contracting group three months ago; the group builds ministry complexes for the government of Turkmenistan. Most of his wealth consists of the fresh sale proceeds. He told the adviser that he is currently negotiating to lead and co-finance a new government housing project in Ashgabat through a newly incorporated vehicle, with signature expected within months.
origin_of_assets: Sale of his contracting stake three months ago.

total_assets.remarks_total_assets: Predominantly recent sale proceeds earmarked for the new venture.
